questions.question: Why is data quality critical in data warehousing?
options: A) Because it is difficult to achieve
B) Because it affects business decisions
C) Because it is not important
D) Because it is easy to maintain
questions.explanation: Data quality is crucial as it directly impacts business decisions and outcomes. Poor data quality can lead to incorrect insights and poor decision-making.

questions.question: What is one of the primary data quality challenges in data warehousing?
questions.explanation: All of the above options (inconsistent data formats, insufficient data, and data duplication) are primary data quality challenges in data warehousing.

questions.question: Which of the following is a benefit of addressing data quality issues?
questions.explanation: Addressing data quality issues can lead to improved data accuracy, reduced costs, and increased productivity.

questions.question: What is the purpose of data validation in data warehousing?
questions.explanation: Data validation is used to detect data inconsistencies, which helps in ensuring data accuracy and maintaining data quality.

questions.question: Why is data quality monitoring important in data warehousing?
options: C) To identify data quality issues before they occur
questions.explanation: Data quality monitoring is important to identify data quality issues before they occur, detect data inconsistencies, and ensure data accuracy.
